actions.description: Action to apply to a user

assignUserToRealm.description: Action that assigns a user to a realm

created.description: Timestamp when the realm assignment was created

domains.description:
Array of allowed domains. No user in this realm can be created or updated unless they have a username and email from one of these domains.

The following characters aren't allowed in the domain name: `!$%^&()=*+,:;<>'[]|/?\`

id.description: Unique ID of the realm assignment

isDefault.description: Indicates the default realm. Existing users will start out in the default realm and can be moved individually to other realms.

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp of when the realm assignment was updated

priority.description:
The priority of the realm assignment. The lower the number, the higher the priority. This helps resolve conflicts between realm assignments.
> **Note:** When you create realm assignments in bulk, realm assignment priorities must be unique.

_links.description: Specifies link relations (see [Web Linking](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc8288)) available using the [JSON Hypertext Application Language](https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/draft-kelly-json-hal-06) specification. This object is used for dynamic discovery of related resources and lifecycle operations.

hints.description: Describes allowed HTTP verbs for the `href`

templated.description: Indicates whether the link object's `href` property is a URI template.

type.description: The media type of the link. If omitted, it is implicitly `application/json`.
